news.title: Up to 697,000 jobs at risk from artificial intelligence and new economy, says Ramanan
news.description: [THE STAR] KUALA LUMPUR: A total of 42,807 people have lost jobs so far this year and up to 697,000 jobs could be at risk of being affected by artificial intelligence, the digital and green economy if they do not reskill.

news.title: Talk of a bubble is 'blasphemy against AI' says SoftBank's Son
news.description: [THE STAR] TOKYO, June 24 (Reuters) - SoftBank ⁠founder and CEO Masayoshi Son told shareholders on Wednesday that artificial intelligence is still in its ⁠early stages and any talk of a bubble is "an insult to AI."
